basic_details.job_title: NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate-I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: JRF: Less than 32 years. Project Associate-I: Less than 35 years.
age_limit.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Maximum age limit is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per GOI norms. Project Associate – I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per GOI norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering or allied fields with GATE score for JRF. M.Tech preferred. B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering or allied fields for Project Associate-I. M.Tech preferred.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.E./B.Tech with first class (1st class) in Electrical Engineering (EE)/Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE)/Electrical and computers Engineering/ Electrical and Instrumentation Engineering (EIE) from a recognized university/ institute with GATE score. Project Associate – I: B.E./B.Tech with first class (1st class) in Electrical Engineering (EE)/Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE)/Electrical and computers Engineering/ Electrical and Instrumentation Engineering (EIE) from a recognized university/ institute.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹37,000/month + HRA (First 2 years) for JRF, ₹30,000/month + HRA (First 2 years) for Project Associate-I
salary_details.details: JRF (selected through GATE): ₹37,000/month + HRA (First 2 years) JRF (selected through GATE): ₹42,000/month + HRA (3rd year, upon successful assessment and upgradation) Project Associate - I (without GATE): ₹30,000/month + HRA (First 2 years) Project Associate - I (without GATE): ₹33,000/month + HRA (3rd year, upon successful assessment and upgradation)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate-I Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.E./B.Tech with first class (1st class) in Electrical Engineering (EE)/Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE)/Electrical and computers Engineering/ Electrical and Instrumentation Engineering (EIE) from a recognized university/ institute with GATE score. Project Associate – I: B.E./B.Tech with first class (1st class) in Electrical Engineering (EE)/Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE)/Electrical and computers Engineering/ Electrical and Instrumentation Engineering (EIE) from a recognized university/ institute.

content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate-I Age Limit
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Maximum age limit is 32 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per GOI norms. Project Associate – I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per GOI norms.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate-I Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: JRF (selected through GATE): ₹37,000/month + HRA (First 2 years) JRF (selected through GATE): ₹42,000/month + HRA (3rd year, upon successful assessment and upgradation) Project Associate - I (without GATE): ₹30,000/month + HRA (First 2 years) Project Associate - I (without GATE): ₹33,000/month + HRA (3rd year, upon successful assessment and upgradation)

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate-I Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Trichy JRF/Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 22nd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position, a B.E./B.Tech degree with first class in Electrical Engineering or allied fields, along with a valid GATE score, is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for both Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Project Associate-I positions will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The salary for JRF is ₹37,000/month + HRA for the first two years, and ₹42,000/month + HRA for the third year, subject to successful assessment.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates with an M.Tech degree apply?
faq.answer: Yes, an M.Tech degree is preferred for both JRF and Project Associate-I positions, although not strictly mandatory if other qualifications are met.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their scanned application along with supporting documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section on this page. It contains all detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate-I in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli is located in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 620015.
